name: LINE Notify
description: LINEs lightweight one-way notification API — simple HTTP POST to ping users from servers, CI, IoT devices.

seo.title: LINE Notify — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: LINE Notify: LINEs lightweight one-way notification API — simple HTTP POST to ping users from servers, CI, IoT devices.

when_to_use: Server-to-user LINE push via simple HTTP POST for CI/CD alerts
IoT device notifications delivered to user's LINE app without SDK
Server monitoring and error alert delivery via LINE Notify webhooks
Lightweight operational notification channel for Japanese user base

pros: Dead-simple HTTP POST to notify users
Free for personal and small-team use
Ideal for CI, alerts, and IoT pings
No SDK or app build required
cons: One-way only — no interaction or buttons
LINE ecosystem only — useless outside Japan/TW/TH
Rate limits hit quickly on busy systems
LINE deprecation risk for any API component
review.verdict: Great hack for personal LINE alerts in Asia; not a product messaging tool in any serious sense.
review.best_for: Developers pinging LINE users from scripts, CI, or IoT
review.not_for: Consumer apps outside LINE regions or two-way messaging

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
